name: Giveaway
description: This object represents a message about a scheduled giveaway.

fields.name: chats
fields.description: The list of chats which the user must join to participate in the giveaway

fields.name: winners_selection_date
fields.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when winners of the giveaway will be selected

fields.name: winner_count
fields.description: The number of users which are supposed to be selected as winners of the giveaway

fields.name: only_new_members
fields.description: True, if only users who join the chats after the giveaway started should be eligible to win

fields.name: has_public_winners
fields.description: True, if the list of giveaway winners will be visible to everyone

fields.name: country_codes
fields.description: A list of two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes indicating the countries from which eligible users for the giveaway must come. If empty, then all users can participate in the giveaway. Users with a phone number that was bought on Fragment can always participate in giveaways.

fields.name: prize_star_count
fields.description: The number of Telegram Stars to be split between giveaway winners; for Telegram Star giveaways only

fields.name: premium_subscription_month_count
fields.description: The number of months the Telegram Premium subscription won from the giveaway will be active for; for Telegram Premium giveaways only
